_note: Boss dialog pool — picked from at runtime by the engine. Each boss has intro / midfight / taunt / defeat arrays. Run `python generate.py boss_dialog` to regenerate via the Anthropic API with fresh variants matching the canon docs.

intro: You don't have to do this.
Walk away. I'll tell Kane it was nothing.
...This is the last time I ask.
midfight: Twenty years on the force taught me patience.
Kane doesn't pay me for nothing.

intro: We could have done this in your kitchen.
You're making this so much harder than it needs to be.
midfight: I don't usually have to chase.
Three million was on the table.
Your jacket is going to need stitches.
taunt: I went to school for this.

intro: So I owe him a building.
midfight: These legs cost more than your block.
defeat: Tell Kane I held the door.

intro: I understand you're upset. I would be too. Let me make it right.
